description_long: This is a compact wooden nightstand with a rectangular top surface and a sturdy, solid build. The front features a single cabinet door with a dark round knob and two visible metal hinges, as well as an open shelf above the door for additional storage. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a rustic and natural appearance, with some minor discoloration and wear on the side and back panels. The legs are integrated into the frame, slightly flared and thick, providing stability. The hardware is simple and functional, with no ornate or decorative elements. The overall finish is matte, and the nightstand appears well-suited for practical use in both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden nightstand with a cabinet door, open shelf, and simple metal hardware. The wood grain and matte finish give it a natural, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cabinet door with a round knob, two metal hinges, and an open shelf above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wooden panel with visible wood grain and no openings or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wooden back panel with some discoloration and no features or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wooden panel, similar to view 1, and a slight glimpse of the door knob.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
